zh.lifeSummary: 當Catherine Ingles於1599年出生在英國蘇格蘭皮布萊爾皮布萊斯時，她的父親Thomas Inglis35歲，母親Lady Euphame Kneland23歲。她於大約1616年與James Bailie of Kailzia在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1697年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年99歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Catherine Ingles于1599年出生在英国苏格兰皮布萊爾皮布萊斯时，她的父亲Thomas Inglis35岁，母亲Lady Euphame Kneland23岁。她于大约1616年与James Bailie of Kailzia在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1697年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安享年99岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ingles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish (Inglés): ethnic name denoting someone of English origin, from Spanish Inglés ‘English’.
Scottish: variant of   English   or   Inglis  .

variants.name: Ingle
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Ingel, Ingald, Ingold (Old Norse Ingialdr, Ingœld, itself apparently borrowed from the Old English Ingeld, a name of ancient Germanic origin consisting of an intensive prefix in- + geld- ‘reward, forfeit’).

English: from the Middle English personal name Ingulf, representing either Old Norse Ingólfr, Ingulf or its ancient Germanic cognate, Ingenwulf, introduced to England by the Normans; the first element is derived from an ancient Germanic heroic name, and the second is ‘wolf’. As a surname it either died out or was absorbed by Ingle and its variants.
Americanized form of German Ingel: from a short form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names formed with Ing- (see 1 above). The surname Ingel is very rare in Germany.

en.lifeSummary: When Catherine Ingles was born in 1599, in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Inglis, was 35 and her mother, Lady Euphame Kneland, was 23. She married James Bailie of Kailzia about 1616, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1697, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 99.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Catherine Ingles est née en 1599, à Peebles, Valle de Twede, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Inglis, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Lady Euphame Kneland, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé James Bailie of Kailzia environ 1616, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1697, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 99 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Catherine Ingles 1599 in Peebles, Peeblesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Inglis 35 und ihre Mutter Lady Euphame Kneland 23. Sie hat um 1616 in Schottland, United Kingdom James Bailie of Kailzia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1697 im Alter von 99 Jahren in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Ingles è nata il nel 1599 nel Peebles, Peeblesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Inglis, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Lady Euphame Kneland, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato James Bailie of Kailzia circa 1616, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1697, nel Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 99 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine Inglesが1599年にイギリススコットランドペエブレシュアイアペエブレスで生まれた時，父Thomas Inglisは35歳，母Lady Euphame Knelandは23歳であった。約1616年にイギリススコットランドでJames Bailie of Kailziaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1697年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンで99歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine Ingles(이)가 1599년 영국 스코틀랜드 피블레실르 피블레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Inglis(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Euphame Kneland(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1616년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 James Bailie of Kailzia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1697년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 99세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Catherine Ingles nasceu em 1599, em Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Inglis, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Lady Euphame Kneland, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com James Bailie of Kailzia aproximadamente 1616, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1697, em Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 99 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Catherine Ingles родилась в 1599 г. в местности пиблесь, пиблессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Inglis было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Euphame Kneland, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Bailie of Kailzia около 1616 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1697 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 99 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Catherine Ingles nació en 1599, en Peebles, Peeblesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Inglis, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Lady Euphame Kneland, tenía 23 años. Se casó con James Bailie of Kailzia aproximadamente 1616, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1697, en Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 99 años.
